notes: Several files labeled as 'Poetry' actually contain advertisement content that should be moved to a Misc file. The Health and Hygiene lessons have some boundary issues where content bleeds between files. Most advertisement content has been incorrectly categorized as poetry rather than being placed in appropriate Misc files.
